name: Evt Limited
analysis: EVT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$13.2000, stop A$11.6325, target A$17.9025 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
